tasks.name: Execution preflight gate (feature start)
tasks.description: Execution preflight for the feature planning pack (validate docs, gates, and dispatch readiness).
acceptance_criteria: Execution preflight gate report is completed with a clear recommendation.
All referenced planning artifacts exist and are internally consistent (plan/spec/contract/decision register).
Smoke scripts are non-scaffold, runnable on their target platforms, and mirror the manual playbook.
start_checklist: Run: make triad-orch-ensure FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/warn-config-global-show-workspace-overrides"
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, specs, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Complete execution_preflight_report.md with ACCEPT/REVISE and required fixes
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

tasks.name: C0 slice (code)
tasks.description: Implement the workspace-override stderr note for `substrate config global show` per the C0 spec/contract.
acceptance_criteria: `substrate config global show` emits the workspace-override note on stderr only when the workspace override is active (per spec).
Stdout remains patch-only (YAML/JSON) and is not contaminated by notes.
`substrate config global show` does not fail due to invalid/unreadable workspace config; it still prints the global patch.
If the workspace-override note is emitted, the existing global-empty note is suppressed for that invocation (per DR-0003).
start_checklist: git checkout feat/warn-config-global-show-workspace-overrides && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/warn-config-global-show-workspace-overrides" SLICE_ID="C0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-code"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: C0 slice (test)
tasks.description: Add/extend tests to cover `config global show` workspace-override stderr behavior and stdout invariants.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover: outside workspace (no note), empty workspace patch (no note), non-empty workspace patch (note), invalid YAML workspace patch (note + success).
`--json` mode is covered: stdout parses as JSON even when stderr note is present.
Tests are deterministic and do not rely on global machine state (use temp dirs and scoped env vars).
start_checklist: git checkout feat/warn-config-global-show-workspace-overrides && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/warn-config-global-show-workspace-overrides" SLICE_ID="C0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
Run the targeted tests you add/touch
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-test"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: CP1 CI checkpoint (cross-platform validation)
tasks.description: Run cross-platform compile parity + feature smoke for slice C0 (schema v4 checkpoint boundary).
acceptance_criteria: CI audit ledger is created/updated for the checkpoint.
Compile parity is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA.
Feature smoke is green for the checkpoint checkout SHA on behavior platforms.

Read ci_checkpoint_plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run ci_audit for ci-testing and feature-smoke (record the audit output lines in session_log.md)
